prompt: Create a seven-panel executive carousel for 'How Executives Turn Ambiguity into Capability'. Panels: 1 title; 2 ambiguity is normal in transformation; 3 forced certainty is insufficient; 4 the six conversion moves; 5 ambiguity becomes information; 6 information becomes repeatable capability; 7 operating principle: do not merely resolve ambiguity—convert it. Use a compounding-loop visual language.
proof_boundaries: Do not imply ambiguity is always beneficial.
Do not claim quantified executive-performance outcomes.
Do not present the six moves as the only valid method.
